overall.description: Third-person underwater gameplay footage showing a scuba diver swimming through a rocky reef environment with tube sponges and coral formations in clear turquoise water. The character navigates around underwater terrain with natural lighting filtering from the surface above.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow rocky reef with tube sponges

events.description: character transitions from stationary pose to forward swimming motion

agents.ego_description: swimming forward over rocky seabed with arms outstretched initially, then proceeding in a streamlined position

entered.detail: rocky seabed covered in marine growth and scattered boulders
yellow-brown tube sponges rising from the reef floor
rippled water surface visible above with light filtering through
green algae and seaweed growing on rock formations

segments.scene_description: The diver begins swimming over a shallow rocky reef covered in tube sponges and patches of seaweed. The clear turquoise water allows visibility of the rippled surface above as sunlight filters down, illuminating the marine growth on the rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: sponge garden with tall vertical formations

agents.ego_description: navigating around tall sponge formations and weaving between coral outcrops

entered.detail: tall vertical tube sponges reaching upward from the reef
large rock formation rising from the seabed

segments.scene_description: Swimming through a denser section of the reef, the diver navigates around tall vertical sponge formations that rise prominently from the seabed. The environment features more concentrated coral structures and larger rock outcrops as the character maneuvers through the underwater terrain.

agents.ego_description: swimming through a narrower rocky passage between large boulder formations

entered.detail: tall pointed rock formation rising from the left side
faint outline of reef structures visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The diver continues through a rockier section characterized by larger boulder formations and spires. The coral density decreases as the character swims between massive rocks, with distant reef formations becoming visible in the clearer water ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that begins in a shallow, sponge-covered reef and progresses into a landscape of massive rock spires. It begins with the diver swimming over a shallow rocky bed where sunlight filters through the rippled surface to illuminate patches of seaweed and tube sponges. As the diver moves deeper into the reef, the environment shifts toward a denser thicket of tall vertical sponge formations and concentrated coral structures. The scene then opens up into a rockier expanse characterized by massive boulders and towering spires, where the coral density decreases. Finally, the camera glides between these large rock formations as distant reef structures emerge through the clear turquoise water ahead.
